full_text:
Zhu Jianping 朱建平
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu Jianping (朱建平)was born in Pei. Renowned for his predictions through physiognomy, predicted the death of Cao Pi and others. Zhu Jianping was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
